problem id: 13009e35
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) OR SHL(4)

examples:
  00101010 -> 10101000
  10000000 -> 00000010
  11001011 -> 10111111
  10010101 -> 01010110
  01001010 -> 10101001
  10010110 -> 01111010
  00000001 -> 00010100
  00110001 -> 11010100
  11010011 -> 01111111
  00111010 -> 11101000

query: 11100110
predicted answer: 11111011
